channel.title: Privacy on Code Before Breach
channel.description: Recent content in Privacy on Code Before Breach

item.title: eIDAS 2.0 vs. Korea’s Digital Identity System: A Comparative Analysis
item.description: Comparative analysis of EU eIDAS 2.0 wallet-based identity and Korea's mobile ID system across governance, privacy, and operations.

item.title: Is Your Data in the Cat's Paws?
item.description: Analysis of the 2025 KakaoPay breach exposing 40M users' data, and why formal consent fails without AI-based DPIA and civic oversight.
